playbook.intent: End of every quarter: drop the worst client, raise rates on the rest, fill the freed slot with a higher-rate engagement, and lock the next quarter's revenue target and capacity allocation.
playbook.scope: End of every quarter: drop the worst client, raise rates on the rest, fill the freed slot with a higher-rate engagement, and lock the next quarter's revenue target and capacity allocation.

success-criteria.criterion: Audit current portfolio stage complete: Client scorecard
Drop & raise stage complete: Drop letter sent
Fill capacity stage complete: Reactivation outreach sent
Lock next quarter stage complete: Q+1 plan doc

stage.name: Audit current portfolio
stage.intent: Score every active client on rate, stress, growth, strategic value.
stage.decision-gate: Advance only with a written ranked list. No subjective vibes.

stage.name: Drop & raise
stage.intent: Drop the worst client; raise rates on the rest.

tasks.task: Write a graceful end-of-engagement note to bottom client
Draft personalised rate-rise notes to the rest
Schedule the conversations within one week

stage.decision-gate: Required: at least one client dropped + one rate-rise sent. No exceptions.

stage.name: Fill capacity
stage.intent: Refill the freed slot at a higher rate.

tasks.task: Publish a 'capacity opens X date' post
Run targeted outreach to upper-band prospects

stage.decision-gate: Advance once freed capacity is booked at ≥ new-rate-floor. Stay if booking at old rate.

stage.name: Lock next quarter
stage.intent: Set explicit revenue target + capacity allocation for next 90 days.

tasks.task: Write Q+1 revenue target with realistic floor + stretch
Allocate weekly hours across delivery / sales / growth / rest

stage.decision-gate: Quarter closes only when plan is written. Verbal intent doesn't count.

extra.value: [Hiring employees or building a team — solo operator throughout, Enterprise procurement processes — SMB / startup buyers only]
[Active freelance practice with at least one paying client, A bookkeeping / time-tracking baseline in place]
[Treating decision_gate as a suggestion — playbook collapses to a checklist if gates are not enforced, Skipping written artifacts because 'it's in my head' — kills traceability and future re-use]
['Did every stage produce a written artifact a stranger could read?', 'Did I actually advance only when the decision_gate criterion was met?']

{human: faion get-content quarterly-portfolio-rebalance --format md, agent: faion get-content quarterly-portfolio-rebalance --format context, json: faion get-content quarterly-portfolio-rebalance --format json}
[{version: 0.1.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: 'Initial draft for F-064 P3 technical-freelancer persona, global angle'}]
